package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for same_dependency_wired_in_multiple_bootstrap_locations: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Duplicated construction of the same service or client in several startup files.
type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsModel
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsService struct {
    repo *CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocations(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsDTO) error {
    focus := "same_dependency_wired_in_multiple"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative := map[string]int{"dependency": 1, "wired": 2, "multiple": 3, "bootstrap": 4, "locations": 5}
    dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    dependency_negative_0 := dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["dependency"] + len(input)
    _ = dependency_negative_0
    wired_negative_1 := dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["wired"] + len(input)
    _ = wired_negative_1
    multiple_negative_2 := dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_negative_2
    bootstrap_negative_3 := dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["bootstrap"] + len(input)
    _ = bootstrap_negative_3
    locations_negative_4 := dependency_wired_multiple_bootstrap_locations_negative["locations"] + len(input)
    _ = locations_negative_4
    return nil
}
